items.title: Essendon coach Brad Scott says his club has moved on from Zach Merrett saga as Bombers set to face Hawthorn
items.summary: Former Essendon captain Zach Merrett is the centre of attention in the build-up to a round-one blockbuster against the club he attempted to join in the off-season.

items.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle confirm Australian visit in April
items.summary: The visit will mark seven years since they last touched down in the country for their successful tour as the newlywed Duke and Duchess of Sussex.

items.title: Former NSW Liberal MP Rory Amon cleared of majority of charges in sexual assault trial
items.summary: A jury has cleared former NSW Liberal MP Rory Amon of the majority of charges he faced over the alleged sexual assault of a 13-year-old boy he met through a hook-up app in 2017.

items.title: Desperation for Iran's women's footballers, as coach says 'we are eager to come back to Iran'
items.summary: There is an increasing sense of urgency among members of the Iranian Australian community who are desperate to hear from the women's team before they leave Australia, and fear for their safety if they return to Iran.

items.title: Masked German football fan unplugs VAR monitor in protest during Bundesliga 2 game
items.summary: Frustrated football fans take their anger at VAR to the next level, with a masked supporter pulling the plug on a replay monitor during a Bundesliga 2 game.

items.title: Tasmania flags new laws to stop 'good character' evidence as mitigating factor for serious offending
items.summary: Tasmania will introduce new laws to stop the use of "good character" references by serious offenders. Advocates say the state has joined a broader national shift to support victim-survivors.

items.title: SA health minister 'very sorry' for leak to media of wrong patient's email
items.summary: South Australia's health minister apologises "unreservedly" for the deliberate leak of an email that the government said was from an Adelaide cancer patient who died in 2025, but turned out to be from a different person with the same name.

items.title: Zac Lomax signs two-year Super Rugby deal in major blow to NRL
items.summary: Zac Lomax signs a deal with Western Force and Rugby Australia in a major blow to the NRL.

items.title: Who is Iran's new supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei?
items.summary: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's son Mojtaba, a hardline, anti-Western mid-ranking cleric, has been chosen to succeed his late father as Iran's supreme leader.

items.title: Food supply lines open as Katherine and Daly River under emergency flood warning
items.summary: While Katherine remains under an emergency flood warning, water levels are now receding and food supply lines are opening up.

items.title: Socceroos keeper Joe Gauci stars as Port Vale downs Sunderland in FA Cup boilover
items.summary: Socceroos keeper Joe Gauci and Aussie manager Jon Brady guide Port Vale past Sunderland into the FA Cup quarters for the first time in 72 years.

items.title: Police speaking with 'a number of witnesses' following alleged campsite stabbing near Tamworth
items.summary: Police allege an altercation between two men has ended in a fatal stabbing at a campsite near Tamworth.

items.title: Why Bridget Jones's Diary still resonates with readers 30 years later
items.summary: When Oxford-educated Helen Fielding introduced readers to Bridget Jones in her newspaper column, in her own words, she was "quite embarrassed". Three decades later, the book has sold more than 15 million copies worldwide.

items.summary: Protesters surround the Iranian women's football team bus after their final match in the Asian Cup, as fears grow for their safety.

items.title: Regional patient 'effectively ramped' for almost three days waiting for care
items.summary: When Riverland farmer Mick Evans had a suspected heart attack last year, he was stranded at a regional hospital for almost three days after an airlift request was continually cancelled and there were no available beds at the Royal Adelaide Hospital.

items.title: India dominates New Zealand in the T20 World Cup final to claim back-to-back titles

items.title: ASX sheds $90 billion as oil's 25pc surge crushes Asian markets
